summary: The European Union regulator has issued an update concerning new Anti-Money Laundering (AML) reporting thresholds. The revised limit is now €5,000 and this change is effective immediately. It is crucial for the compliance team to update our internal policies in accordance with this new regulation. Additionally, the finance department should be informed to adjust customer verification procedures accordingly.

tasks.description: Update internal policies in accordance with the new Anti-Money Laundering (AML) reporting thresholds
